checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export localStorage.jones_fastlane_save to disk. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the authoritative Week 1 checkpoint or live summary state in `phase11-safe-grinder`, advance exactly one completed in-game week, treat `Work Shift x3` as the default Safe Grinder baseline whenever time and hunger allow, and write the canonical `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-02.md` before exporting the Week 2 checkpoint.

last_run.summary: Persona A was restarted from onboarding, re-established the deterministic `Sanitation-T3` plus `Work Shift x3` baseline, and closed authoritative Week 1 at `₡172 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 45%` with a fresh checkpoint export for Week 2 continuation.
